title: androsace tibetica var. mariae
intro: Androsace tibetica var. mariae, also known as the Tibetan rock jasmine, is a plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and small, oval-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Androsace tibetica var. mariae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Androsace tibetica var. mariae can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
